name: Mitigant Cloud Security API
description: Mitigant (formerly Resility) is a cloud infrastructure security platform that provides attack surface management, cloud security posture assessment, and chaos engineering for cloud environments (AWS, Azure, GCP). The API enables programmatic access to scan management, findings, assets, attack simulations, and compliance reporting.
